---
title: "William Acosta Lora"
about:
  id: intro-heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/william_headshot.png
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:you@macalester.edu
---

:::{#intro-heading}

Hi! I'm **William Acosta Lora**, a junior at Macalester College studying Computer Science with a minor in Data Science. I grew up in Venezuela and Louisiana, and I'm passionate about using machine learning to address bias in clinical algorithms and expand access to equitable healthcare.

## Education

**Macalester College** | St. Paul, MN
B.A. in Computer Science, Data Science Minor | Sept 2023 - May 2027

## Experience

**Data, Innovation & Architecture Solutions Intern** | Ecolab | Summer 2026

**Software Engineering Intern** | Medtronic | Previous

**CS Teaching Assistant** | Macalester College | Current

## Skills

R · Python · SQL · tidymodels · ggplot2 · Flask · React · PyTorch · scikit-learn

:::
